test.name: Status report when progress is blocked by unresolved conflicts
test.description: Two unresolved conflicts both list `blocks_question_ids: ['q_001']`. A useful status report names the blockers explicitly rather than burying them in narrative.

judge_context: Should explicitly name c_001 (birthplace, fact conflict) and c_002 (identity conflict) as blockers of q_001
Should distinguish the two conflict types in the report — fact-conflict vs identity-conflict matter analytically
Should not pretend the project is on track; honest reporting is the value of this skill
